docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AISLING FERGUSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK SPITERI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $6,175.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOVEMBER 15, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FERGUSON, AISLING AS TO DEFENDANT SPITERI, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/12/22; CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PATRICK SPITERI-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 11/28/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PATRICK SPITERI-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED AUG-09-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPITERI, PATRICK
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
